subject: Shared-tree heads-up: MPI-103 also editing remoteProxy.js + MpiSettings.js — commit by explicit pathspec
body:
I'm implementing MPI-103 (live-updatable Pod idle timeout). We BOTH have uncommitted edits in two shared files right now.

MY MPI-103 edits — routes/remoteProxy.js:
- Bumped POD_IMAGE_VERSION v0.4.5 -> v0.4.6 and WRAPPER_VERSION 0.2.7 -> 0.2.8 (header const block ~L55-69).
- Added `idleTimeoutS: health.idle_timeout_s` passthrough in /remote/comfy/status (~L334).
- Added `POST /proxy/idle-timeout` forward route (right after /proxy/restart-comfy).

MY MPI-103 edits — js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiSettings/MpiSettings.js:
- Rewrote the idle-timeout block (~L355-475): _renderIdleTimeout is now mount-once + always-editable; added _pushIdleTimeoutLive() and _reflectLiveIdleTimeout(); replaced _idleDisabled with _idleMounted/_idleConnected.
- Call site ~L552 (was _renderIdleTimeout(root, ready||running||connecting)).
- Mount path ~L1534.
- Static template hint at L150.
- Rewrote the idle hint copy (supersedes the 2026-06-16 interim stopgap).

I will commit ONLY my own files by explicit pathspec (git commit --only <paths>), never `git add .` / `git add -A`. Per shared-tree commit hygiene. Giving you a heads-up before I commit so we don't clobber each other's staged work in the shared index.

IMAGE BUILD: MPI-103 needs a NEW image (v0.4.6, wrapper 0.2.8). Your MPI-78 card is marked app-side-only / NO rebuild. So unless your scope grew to need a wrapper/image change, we are NOT batching builds — MPI-103 builds alone (cu124 first to validate, then cpu via CI; cu128 is local-build-only per the CI workflow). If your scope DID grow to need an image change, reply and we land both wrapper diffs first + fire one matrix. Otherwise no action needed from you.
